ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Continued To Aug-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will, the Court noting that notice of the proceedings appears to be complete and that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated June 30, 2020 is admitted to probate. Alice Lin is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on April 19, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed the Probate Referee.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2021 Continued To Apr-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
